name: @bitculator/sdk
description: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for the Bitculator Data API

scripts.sync-version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=require('./package.json').version;const q=String.fromCharCode(39);fs.writeFileSync('src/version.ts','/** SDK version, sent in the User-Agent header. Kept in sync with package.json. */\nexport const VERSION = '+q+v+q+';\n')"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run sync-version && npm run build
